headline: Azul Releases Updated OpenJDK Migration for Dummies Guide as Oracle Java Migration Accelerates
summary: SUNNYVALE, Calif., May 19, 2026--Azul, the trusted leader in enterprise Java for today’s AI and cloud-first world, today released the second edition of OpenJDK Migration for Dummies, a free guide to help enterprises move from Oracle Java to OpenJDK. The update includes recent long-term support (LTS) releases, refreshed security guidance and updated details on deprecated and removed features.

headline: Oracle IBM AI Cloud Alliance And What It Might Mean For ORCL Valuation
summary: Oracle and IBM have agreed to expand their 40 year partnership to deliver new integrated AI and hybrid cloud solutions. The companies plan to launch these joint offerings in 2026, targeting demand from enterprises using multi cloud and AI workloads. The collaboration focuses on combining Oracle cloud and database strengths with IBM's hybrid cloud and services capabilities. For investors watching NYSE:ORCL, this move comes with the stock recently trading around $186.61, with a 1 year return...
